name: EscapeGameShow: THE TIMELINE
short_description: Dive into an immersive adventure with EscapeGameShow: THE TIMELINE. You participate in a TV game show to try to win the jackpot. Explore fascinating eras by solving complex puzzles that will test your intelligence and ingenuity.
detailed_description:
Dive into a thrilling adventure with "EscapeGameShow: THE TIMELINE", an innovative escape room game that transports you through different eras of history. Designed for puzzle and riddle lovers, this game offers an immersive and challenging experience.

Explore various historical eras, each era presenting its own unique challenges and mysteries.

Solve ingenious puzzles that will test your logic, creativity, and problem-solving skills.

Accessibility: Designed to be accessible to all levels of players, with built-in tutorials and hints to help beginners while providing sufficient challenges for experts.

Rewards and Achievements: Earn trophies and rewards by solving puzzles and progressing through the story.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Spanish - Latin America, Japanese, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Thai, Turkish
